Package: Catch2
Repository: https://github.com/catchorg/Catch2.git
Checked on: 2026-03-24 UTC
Checked-out commit: ccc49ba66484

Current public vulnerability status:
- No published security advisories were visible on the GitHub security page as of 2026-03-24.
- This is an inference from public tracker state, not a full source-code audit of this checkout.

Notes:
- Catch2's security policy explicitly says the project should not normally process untrusted input, which likely reduces its attack surface in typical use.

Sources:
- https://github.com/catchorg/Catch2/security
